title: Sobha Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sobha Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers:
Sobha Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers!
